0.content: Customer Support Portal Refund Policy details: We offer full refunds within 30 days of purchase for any customer who is unhappy with our service plans. To initiate a refund, please send your billing receipt and subscription account details to refunds@example.com. Refunds take approximately 5-7 business days to process and post back to your credit card statement. Please note that premium plans upgraded over 30 days ago are not eligible for billing refunds.
